name: Daniel Calder
_doc: Single source of truth for the VirtuAI persona. Every generation pipeline (text, image, voice, video) reads from this file. Never edit identity fields after the LoRA + voice clone are trained — those weights are bound to these descriptors.

face.facial_hair: medium-short groomed beard with mustache, well-trimmed
face.hair: dark brown, thick and wavy, side-swept with natural texture, medium length on top, shorter on the sides

identity.wardrobe_default: dark casual jacket or shirt, layered tones, no logos

bio.voice_persona: direct, motivational, intense, no fluff, authority-driven

face_assets._hero_note: Front-facing 512x512 portrait generated by the trained LoRA (test_00). Designated as the canonical face for SadTalker driving and any production use.  Face similarity to training set: 0.71 (max single-image cosine sim, ArcFace embeddings).

face_lora._output_dir_note: mflux resolves output_path relative to CWD, NOT the config file. Final dir is at the project root with a timestamp suffix.
face_lora.stopped_reason: Converged at step 300; macOS swap thrashing made remaining steps unworkable. Step 455 LoRA visually matches training photos — see preview/0000450_preview_image_preview.png.
face_lora._inference_note: Use the dedicated `mflux-generate-z-image-turbo` CLI, not generic `mflux-generate --model z-image-turbo`. The generic loader expects a FLUX-style text_encoder_2/ subdir that is not part of the official Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image-Turbo repo.

voice_assets._source_note: Original 49s MP3 was an ElevenLabs preset voice 'Ethan – Energetic YouTube Narrator'. Trimmed to 9.77s at a silence boundary for F5-TTS-optimal cloning. ElevenLabs is only data prep — runtime is local F5-TTS.

voice_clone._doc: Zero-shot voice cloning. The reference WAV + transcript are the speaker embedding — no fine-tuning needed. Backend's /generate-voice endpoint is the canonical entrypoint; clone_voice.py CLI is for one-off testing.

talking_head._doc: Phase 3. Combines voice clone audio + face reference image into lip-synced video locally.

prompts.image_negative: blurry, low quality, distorted face, extra limbs, deformed, child, woman, cartoon, illustration
prompts._doc: Use image_prefix at the START of every face image prompt. The trigger token must come early in the prompt for the LoRA to fire.
